tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
tasks.delete_column_confirm: Delete this column? Tasks in it must be moved first.
tasks.delete_type_confirm: Delete this task type? Tasks with this type will have their type cleared.
tasks-plugin.description: Kanban for humans, MCP for agents. One board, same tasks. Per-project columns, task types, authored comments, eighteen MCP tools.
tasks-plugin.mcp.list_tasks: List tasks with optional filters for status, priority range, project_id, type_id, assignee_id, and result limit.
tasks-plugin.mcp.create_task: Create a new task. Title is required. Status defaults to pending, priority defaults to 3.
tasks-plugin.mcp.get_task: Retrieve a single task by its integer ID.
tasks-plugin.mcp.update_task: Update one or more fields on an existing task by ID. Only supplied fields are changed.
tasks-plugin.mcp.delete_task: Permanently delete a task by ID. Cascade-deletes associated comments. Returns deleted=true if the row existed.
tasks-plugin.mcp.get_task_detail: Retrieve a task with its comments, type info, and board columns.
tasks-plugin.mcp.list_board_columns: List all board columns (statuses) ordered by position.
tasks-plugin.mcp.create_board_column: Create a new board column (status). Name must be unique.
tasks-plugin.mcp.update_board_column: Update a board column's label, position, or color.
tasks-plugin.mcp.delete_board_column: Delete a custom board column. Default columns and columns with tasks cannot be deleted.
tasks-plugin.mcp.create_task_type: Create a new task type with optional color and icon.
tasks-plugin.mcp.update_task_type: Update a task type's label, color, or icon.
tasks-plugin.mcp.delete_task_type: Delete a task type. Tasks with this type will have type_id cleared.
tasks-plugin.mcp.list_comments: List comments for a task, ordered by creation time.
tasks-plugin.mcp.create_comment: Add a comment to a task. Supports user and agent author types.
tasks-plugin.mcp.update_comment: Update the body of an existing comment by ID.
